title: Bounty: The Red Knife Captain
summary: Track and eliminate a goblin captain raiding caravans.
description: Merchants are pooling coin for proof that the Red Knife captain is dealt with. Scouts report ambushes near a broken watchtower.
objective_structure: Gather witness reports at the caravanserai
Track the raiders to the broken watchtower
Defeat or capture the Red Knife captain
Return proof to collect the bounty
follow_up_hooks: Captured ledgers point to a larger sponsor.

title: Missing: Apothecary's Apprentice
summary: Find an apprentice who vanished while gathering herbs.
description: The local apothecary begs for help after their apprentice failed to return from marsh-edge herb fields.
objective_structure: Question locals about the apprentice's route
Search the marsh edge for signs
Decide whether to reveal the full truth
follow_up_hooks: A strange reagent vial hints at illicit alchemy buyers.

title: Escort: Salt Road Convoy
summary: Guard a caravan through a known ambush corridor.
description: A salt convoy must pass through narrow ravines where raiders and hungry beasts strike at dusk.
objective_structure: Deliver cargo to the gate quartermaster
follow_up_hooks: One crate is marked for a banned cult client.

title: Courier Run: Midnight Ledger
summary: Deliver a sealed ledger before dawn without opening it.
description: A nervous clerk needs discreet couriers to deliver a ledger to a magistrate under cover of night.
objective_structure: Secure a safe route across town
Deliver the sealed ledger before dawn
follow_up_hooks: Ledger names connect to a noble conspiracy.

title: Gathering Contract: Mooncap Cluster
summary: Collect rare fungi before rival foragers strip the cave.
description: The brewers' guild offers coin for fresh mooncap mushrooms found in damp caverns at first light.
objective_structure: Acquire cave route from local scout
follow_up_hooks: A deeper chamber contains an ancient druid sigil.

title: Clear the Den: Wolfrun Caves
summary: Drive out creatures threatening nearby farms.
description: Farmers report livestock losses near limestone caves. They seek a crew to clear the den before harvest.
follow_up_hooks: Runes in the den suggest deliberate relocation.

title: Defense Call: Belltower Village
summary: Help repel a coordinated night raid.
description: Village elders request defenders to hold key choke points during an expected raid.
follow_up_hooks: Raiders carried a crest tied to a rival barony.

title: Rescue: The Ransomed Mason
summary: Recover a stonemason kidnapped by extortionists.
description: A guild mason was taken after refusing sabotage work. Time-sensitive rescue requested.
follow_up_hooks: Captive overheard plans targeting city walls.

title: Haunted Manor on Gallow Hill
summary: Investigate disturbances and lay spirits to rest.
description: A once-grand manor is now avoided due to night lights, voices, and missing squatters.
objective_structure: Explore the manor and identify the haunting source
Secure relic evidence for the clergy
follow_up_hooks: One spirit names a still-living conspirator.

title: Recover Relic: Ashen Crypt Sigil
summary: Retrieve a warding relic before tomb robbers do.
description: Scholars need a sigil from an unstable crypt to reinforce failing city wards.
follow_up_hooks: Wards reveal a second, hidden relic site.

title: Boss Contract: Iron-Jaw Ogryn
summary: A high-risk contract against a hardened warlord.
description: Multiple settlements offer pooled bounty for the defeat of Iron-Jaw and his mercenary core.
follow_up_hooks: A surviving lieutenant offers to defect.

title: Ruin Investigation: Starwell Vault
summary: Survey a newly exposed ruin and report threats.
description: Recent tremors uncovered stairs into an old vault. Scholars pay for a full hazard report.
follow_up_hooks: Survey notes match a forgotten sky-temple map.

title: Bandit Camp at Riverfork
summary: Break a toll-gang camp blocking the river road.
description: Travelers are being shaken down at a makeshift bridge camp. Remove the threat.
follow_up_hooks: Ledger links payments to a city fixer.

title: Faction Errand: Sealed Emissary Packet
summary: Carry and safeguard diplomatic materials between factions.
description: A neutral envoy seeks trusted escorts for sensitive correspondence between tense factions.
objective_structure: Meet envoy and accept neutrality terms
follow_up_hooks: One faction requests covert follow-up support.

title: Tavern Rumour: The Sunken Cellar
summary: Follow a tavern lead about smuggling tunnels under the district.
description: Regulars whisper that an old cellar hides an active smuggler lane and a missing witness.
objective_structure: Question tavern regulars for consistent clues
Report findings or leverage the secret
follow_up_hooks: Tunnel markings match a larger coastal route.
